ddls:
CREATE TABLE "api_endpoints" (
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API endpoint */,
  "endpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the API endpoint (e.g., GET /activity/all) */,
  "request_count" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made to this endpoint */,
  "endpoint_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the API endpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the endpoint was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the endpoint */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the endpoint is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding API endpoint */,
  "percentile_50" INTEGER /* Response time at the 50th percentile */,
  "percentile_66" INTEGER /* Response time at the 66th percentile */,
  "percentile_75" INTEGER /* Response time at the 75th percentile */,
  "percentile_80" INTEGER /* Response time at the 80th percentile */,
  "percentile_90" INTEGER /* Response time at the 90th percentile */,
  "percentile_95" INTEGER /* Response time at the 95th percentile */,
  "percentile_98" INTEGER /* Response time at the 98th percentile */,
  "percentile_99" INTEGER /* Response time at the 99th percentile */,
  "percentile_100" INTEGER /* Response time at the 100th percentile */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* The date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* The time when the metric was recorded */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* The total number of requests for the given metric record */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* The number of requests that resulted in errors */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* The success rate of the requests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, product manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance metrics */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API endpoint being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the client used to access the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* The exact timestamp of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding API endpoint */,
  "threshold_50" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 50th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_66" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 66th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_75" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 75th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_80" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 80th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_90" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 90th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_95" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 95th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_99" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 99th percentile response time alert */,
  "threshold_100" INTEGER /* Threshold for the 100th percentile response time alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the alert setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "request_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request statistic record */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding API endpoint */,
  "total_requests" INTEGER /* Total number of requests made */,
  "average_response_time" INTEGER /* Average response time for the endpoint */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* The date when the statistics were recorded */,
  "min_response_time" INTEGER /* The minimum response time */,
  "max_response_time" INTEGER /* The maximum response time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the statistic was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_request_statistics_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding API endpoint */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., response time, error rate) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_alerts_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_usage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage report */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding API endpoint */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of requests made to the endpoint on that date */,
  "report_period" TEXT /* The period of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "success_count" INTEGER /* The number of successful requests */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* The number of requests that resulted in errors */,
  "average_response_time" INTEGER /* The average response time for the report period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_usage_reports_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_times" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response time entry */,
  "endpoint_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding API endpoint */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time for an individual request */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "request_id" TEXT /* A unique identifier for each request */,
  "method" TEXT /* The HTTP method used for the request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* The HTTP status code of the response */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the response was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_times_endpoint_id FOREIGN KEY ("endpoint_id") REFERENCES api_endpoints ("endpoint_id")
)
